content.text:
please check ~/.pi/agent/broken-extension/ folder. I removed that extension now for safety. Somehow after that extension, pi began constantly crashing with below error; i am trying to figure out what changes caused this crash. please help me identify it, you can check todays session logs if needed:

pi exiting due to uncaughtException:
TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'length')
    at visibleWidth (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/utils.js:170:13)
    at file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/components/select-list.js:120:37
    at Array.reduce (<anonymous>)
    at SelectList.getPrimaryColumnWidth (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/components/select-list.js:119:50)
    at SelectList.render (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/components/select-list.js:43:41)
    at Container.render (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/tui.js:85:38)
    at Object.render (/Users/bparlan/.pi/agent/extensions/bash-guard/index.ts:368:33)
    at TUI.compositeOverlays (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/tui.js:588:42)
    at TUI.doRender (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/tui.js:753:29)
    at Timeout._onTimeout (file:///Users/bparlan/.local/share/fnm/node-versions/v22.16.0/installation/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-tui/dist/tui.js:372:18)
[ble: exit 1]

content.thinking:
**Analyzing the `pi` Crash**

I'm currently focused on a recurring crash in `pi`, pinpointing a `TypeError` within the TUI components. The error, "Cannot read properties of null (reading 'length')", originates in `SelectList.getPrimaryColumnWidth`. I'm now investigating the potential causes, especially the conditions that might lead to a null value where a string length is expected. This seems to be the critical issue.
